name: Ron Paul
subject: Enemy of the State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

It's no secret.

The national media and the establishment of both parties would love nothing more than to drive a stake through the heart of our Liberty Movement and stop my son, Rand, at all costs.

That's why, with the September 30th fundraising deadline rapidly approaching, Rand needs the support of our grassroots army of liberty lovers now more than ever.

**[Can I count on you to"Stand with Rand" by chipping in a generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591132:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)**?

The gatekeepers in the press are going all-out to destroy Rand just like they tried to destroy me.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591132:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)

And if they succeed, they'll go on to even more spending, spying, welfare and warfare in Washington, D.C.

I was able to weather the media's viciousness because I had patriots like you at my side.

Because good folks like you stood with me, the Washington Machine failed. And our Liberty Movement continues to grow.

But unlike other candidates, Rand isn't depending on Wall Street fat-cats and banksters who want more special treatment, bailouts and stimulus packages to bankroll his candidacy.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591132:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)
Rand is depending on patriots like you who are willing to fight to take our country back.

Fellow Conservative, this is by far the most important fundraising deadline of Rand's entire campaign.

And every dollar is critical.

**[So please agree to make your most generous contribution of $20.16 to help Rand fight back against the Washington Machine's smears](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591132:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)**.

Rand is the ONLY one in the race who is standing up for your Liberty across the board.

And I believe he's our best hope to restore liberty, limited government and the Bill of Rights and finally end the big spending status quo in Washington, D.C.

I'm proud to say I "Stand with Rand."

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591132:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)

And today I hope you'll join me by **[chipping in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591132:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)** to Rand's End of the Quarter Fundraising Push immediately.

Thank you in advance for your support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591133:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591134:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591135:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591136:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591132:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)

For Liberty,

Ron Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591132:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591137:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591138:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30591139:WqPqOPmNt:m:1:879035888:D9A19CBAD72605362644A48AC6C02DC0:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Is Fellow Conservative a punching bag?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

You and I are supposed to be punching bags for the national media and pro-abortion members of BOTH parties.

We're supposed to play nice and smile for the cameras while abortion apologists demean us with every ugly smear in the books. And Fellow Conservative, you and I are never, ever supposed to go on the offense!

Those are the unwritten rules in Washington, D.C. when it comes to the abortion debate. The rules -- with the help of good folks like you -- I'm breaking each and every day.

But for daring to lead the fight to defund Planned Parenthood and turn the tables on pro-abortion Democrats, I'm being attacked like never before.

**[So with the FEC's September 30th End of Quarter fundraising deadline rapidly approaching, will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599630:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r)**?

Just a few days ago, someone showed me an email sent out by national Democrats attacking me for leading the fight to defund Planned Parenthood.

Reports show I've been attacked by Democrats more than any other candidate.

They know I don't play by their rules.

And they know a President who will boldly stand up and expose their pro-abortion radicalism are the abortion lobby's worst nightmare.

That's exactly what I will do if elected President. That's exactly what I've done throughout my entire life.

In fact, my campaign has put together a special "Sanctity of Life" video, which you can see here.

My first public speech as a teenager was made urging members of my church to take a stand on the issue of life.

As a medical student, I refused to have anything to do with abortion.

As a physician, I treated premature babies virtually every week -- and I saw firsthand just how precious these little lives were. The same lives the pro-abortion left tells us are worthless.

As a U.S. Senator, I've earned a 100% pro-life rating from National Right to Life.

I introduced the National Life at Conception Act to end abortion nationwide.

And I won't cower in the face of attacks from the abortion lobby like the media and the Big Government establishment says I'm "supposed to."

Instead, I want Hillary Clinton and the Democrats to answer how they can support abortion of fully-formed, six and seven pound unborn babies?

How can they support the killing of an unborn baby just because the little unborn girl wasn't the boy someone wanted?

How can they continue to send our tax dollars to Planned Parenthood after this organization was caught red-handed aborting babies, dismembering them and selling their body parts for profit?

But it's up to you and me to put the abortion lobby and their allies on the spot.

My plan to force an end to funding for Planned Parenthood is simple, and it would unquestionably put blame squarely on Democrats if they dare to shut down the government.

All that's necessary is to require 60 votes for passage of any spending through the U.S. Senate.

Pro-abortion Democrats just won't have the votes to keep sending a half-a-billion of our taxpayer dollars to Planned Parenthood every year.

And if President Obama wants to shut down the entire federal government over it, let him explain why to the American people.

We are not punching bags. And I'm not playing by the Washington Machine's rules.

But I'm counting on you to help me take this fight to the White House.

**[So will you please give as generously as you can to my campaign with the September 30th End of Quarter Deadline rapidly approaching](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599630:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r)**?

Perhaps you can give $20.16 or even more?

Fellow Conservative, please act at once.

I'm counting on your support.

| ****[ ** dpwillis67@gmail.com ** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599630:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?q3&sr=rhf092415nd2")
**CONTRIBUTED TO END OF QUARTER PUSH?**
**## NO DONATION ##** ** **
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599631:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599632:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599633:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599634:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599630:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599630:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599635:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599636:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30599637:WbXxyfmEN:m:1:879035888:00D606D0CCA23986BC7DE903B4F7A419:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Fritts
subject: don’t forget to set your lineup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Christie for President, Inc
body:
Have you set your lineup this week?

This is a friendly reminder to double check and submit your lineup changes before the start of the Giants/Redskins game tonight at 8:25pm.

A double reminder that you need to pick your 2016 lineup! As you saw in the last debate, Team Christie is on offense, and we need your help to keep moving the ball down the field.

Visit **[www.chrischristie.com/donate](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44089281:61N-68LN5:m:1:1516426255:4A2E6C48DCB18A052236F166A87968CC:r)** and chip in to set up your 2016 lineup with Team Christie today!
Lauren Fritts
Digital Director
****

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44089281:61N-68LN5:m:1:1516426255:4A2E6C48DCB18A052236F166A87968CC:r)

name: Rand Paul
subject: ## Announcement ##
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

I'll get right to the point.

Too many establishment Republicans and leaders in Washington fail to fight for our values.

And the American people are FED UP.

It's why our nominating contest is wide open as, just this week, a one-time front-runner dropped out of the race because he didn't have grassroots support.

**[The September 30th deadline is the most critical I will face as a candidate and I need to count on you to chip in a contribution of $20.16 immediately](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602464:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, this race has proven voters feel our values are under assault and are demanding an authentic change agent.

A recent Gallup poll reported 49% of Americans believe the government is an immediate threat to their freedom and liberty.

And with Republicans in Washington's first option being surrender of critical issues, such as defunding Planned Parenthood, the American people are hunting around for a candidate to challenge the status quo.

While the media zones in on the cult of celebrity, I am the only candidate in this race to offer a detailed plan to defeat the Washington Machine and take our country back by:

>>> Ending the IRS with my 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax that will slash taxes for all Americans as everyone pays one low rate.

>>> Repealing ALL of ObamaCare.

>>> Kicking career politicians out of office with term limits.

>>> Stopping illegal NSA spying once-and-for-all.

So I will take a backseat to no one in fighting the establishment.

When I first ran for office, the powers that be lined up against me and I defeated their hand-picked candidate.

In the Senate I've stood against the go-along to-get along crowd even when they tried to use a holiday weekend to ram through renewal of the so-called "PATRIOT" Act's illegal domestic spying.

That's why my campaign has produced a TV ad to spread the message that I'm the only constitutional conservative in this race with a plan to upend Big Government.

But I need your help to break through the media's obsession with candidates insulting one another and bickering on debate stages.

Fellow Conservative, as the candidates who have dropped out of this race have shown, a big money Super PAC stuffed to the brim with cash isn't enough to sustain a campaign.

You need the support of the grassroots to outlast the media created "flavors of the week."

And with the September 30th deadline just 6 days away, I need to count on your immediate support.

**[So please watch my campaign's TV ad and chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602464:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r)**.

Time is running out and there isn't a moment to spare, **[so please stand with me](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602464:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r)**.

| ****[ ** dpwillis67@gmail.com ** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602464:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?q3v1&sr=rhf092415a3")
**CONTRIBUTED TO END OF QUARTER PUSH?**
**## NO DONATION ##** ** **
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602465:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602466:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602467:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602468:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602464:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602464:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602469:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602470:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30602471:WLkqGfmZN:m:1:879035888:2E99E49EDE9F3BB5B96DC7B8FBC296C7:r)

name: Josh Wolf
subject: UPDATE: Koch attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

If there's a silver lining to the Kochs attacking Patrick for **OPPOSING** _Citizens United_ , it's this: **We must be doing something right.**

The Kochs support candidates with out-of-touch, out-of-control agendas -- like the Republicans trying to defund Planned Parenthood and shut down the government right now.

Patrick is being attacked because the Kochs know he will work against them at every turn. They know he vehemently opposes _Citizens United_ and the rest of their radical agenda. And what's more -- _**they know Patrick can beat one of their allies in a general election.**_

[**If we 're going to fight back against the attacks, we need to keep up the pace. We NEED to reach our $50,000 FEC goal before the deadline. Can you make a contribution to help?**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20bb/738133e4/3a924fae/7f8dd66e/3535608626/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150924f?refcode=pme150924f_a&recurring=true")

A win for us in Florida could tip the balance in the United States Senate.

The Kochs don't want Republicans to lose power. They don't want a Senate that works to raise the minimum wage, protect Medicare or Social Security, or address climate change.

They want to keep the Senate just the way it is -- right in their back pockets.

[**Fighting back against these attacks and smears is a big job -- and we NEED to raise $50,000 this month to do it. We only have 6 days left before the deadline. If you can, give $5 or more right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20bb/738133e4/3a924fae/7f8dd66e/3535608626/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150924f?refcode=pme150924f_a&recurring=true")

Thank you for all of your help.

Josh | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20bb/738133e4/3a924fae/7f8dd66f/3535608626/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20bb/738133e4/3a924fae/7f8dd668/3535608626/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

name: Katie McGinty
subject: Our biggest test
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

**Our campaign is heading into our biggest test yet -- our quarterly filing with the Federal Election Commission.**

Once that report goes public, the media and our opponents will start poring through it to see just how strong of a campaign we've built. _National Journal_ has already ranked our race in the top four of "Senate seats most likely to flip in 2016." You can bet Pat Toomey and his special interest allies are ready to spend millions in attacks to protect his job. We need to be ready to fight back.

**[My team has set a grassroots fundraising goal of $10,000 before September 30th. Can I count on you to pitch in $10 today to help us reach our goal?](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6039955922170675200/-6201718370656583680?refcode=20150924e&amount=15)**

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6039955922170675200/-6201718370656583680?refcode=20150924e&amount=15)
---

People from all corners of Pennsylvania -- and across the country -- have stepped up to support our campaign because they know this is a must-win race in 2016.

In the Senate, Pat Toomey has voted to cut critical funding for women's health, kill job growth by supporting unfair trade deals, and chip away at environmental protections that keep our water and air clean. Our Commonwealth can't afford another six years of Pat Toomey.

But to defeat him, we need to build a strong campaign right now. Your support today will ensure we have the resources to build a strong grassroots infrastructure that will be ready to take on Toomey next November.

**Let 's finish our first fundraising quarter strong and show Pat Toomey and his special interest friends that we will give this race everything we've got. **

**[Chip in $10 today and help us reach our $10,000 fundraising goal.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6039955922170675200/-6201718370656583680?refcode=20150924e&amount=15)**

Thank you,

Katie

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6039955922170675200/-6201718370656583680?refcode=20150924e&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6039955922170675200/-6273775964694511616).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Team Jeb
subject: Deal expires at midnight
body:
Friend,

In 6 days, our fundraising quarter ends, which means we'll have to publicly show how much money we have, and Hillary Clinton and our opponents will be going through our report line by line.

We have a big budget to hit by Wednesday, and we're gearing up to send a lot of emails to accomplish that. But as one of our biggest supporters, Friend, we wanted to offer you a deal.

[**If you chip in $25 by midnight tonight, you won 't see another fundraising email from us in your inbox this month.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/xgglkpcqsbrtgygdtpmlstnycctnqykqlpjprqydcdjh_olrwwmqf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

That's right. No more emails asking for money with a small donation right now. Since Jeb is such a big emailer, you'll still be up to date with important news from the campaign, but that's it.

[**We promise, if you chip in $25 before midnight, you won 't hear a peep from us asking for money. Are you going to take us up on our offer?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/vyybdkyzmghnrcrfnktbmnqcyynqzcdzbkjkhzcfyfjk_olrwwmqf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Chip in $25 now: **[Jeb2016.com/September-Supporter/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/gmnqskmpntrdwfwcdkhqndjfmmdjpfspqklkrpfcmclr_olrwwmqf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

\--Team Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/eqzljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcrqrzh_olrwwmqf.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

We hope you'll tune in and tell your friends!

For Liberty,

Team Cruz

name: Robby Mook, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: a quick note before the end of the month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Stand with Hillary before the deadline: | Friend --

There’s no guarantee that Hillary Clinton will be the Democratic nominee for president. The polls are very close, and the truth is we always knew this would be a tight election.

**[Our next big fundraising deadline is coming up on September 30th. Can you chip in $1 or more before this important deadline?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM1OTM4NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNTkwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Our next fundraising report will face a lot of scrutiny, and believe me, the press will be quick to write any story counting us out -- but they don’t know this team like I do. They don’t know how strong and deep our support runs, and how you’ve had Hillary’s back at every critical moment of this campaign.

**This is one of those moments. Can you step up and chip in $1 or more right now?

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/deadline/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM1OTM4NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNTkwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you so much. We can’t win this without you.

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

| **Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM1OTM4NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNTkwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM1OTM4NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNTkwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM1OTM4NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNTkwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM1OTM4NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNTkwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjM1OTM4NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNTkwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM1OTM4NDkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyNTkwOTcwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Why we must listen to Pope Francis
body:
#
_"If politics must truly be at the service of the human person, it follows that it cannot be a slave to the economy and finance. Politics is, instead, an expression of our compelling need to live as one, in order to build as one the greatest common good: that of a community which sacrifices particular interests in order to share, in justice and peace, its goods, its interests, its social life. I do not underestimate the difficulty that this involves, but I encourage you in this effort."_ \- Pope Francis addressing Congress today
Brothers and Sisters: I am not a theologian, an expert on the Bible, or a Catholic. I am just a U.S. senator from the small state of Vermont.
But I am emailing you today to discuss Pope Francis in the hope that we can examine the very profound lessons that he is teaching people all over this world and some of the issues for which he is advocating.
Now, there are issues on which the pope and I disagree -- like choice and marriage equality -- but from the moment he was elected, Pope Francis immediately let it be known that he would be a different kind of pope, a different kind of religious leader. He forces us to address some of the major issues facing humanity: war, income and wealth inequality, poverty, unemployment, greed, the death penalty and other issues that too many prefer to ignore.
He is reaching out not just to the Catholic Church. He's reaching out to people all over the world with an incredibly strong message of social justice talking about the grotesque levels of wealth and income inequality.
**Pope Francis is looking in the eyes of the wealthiest people around the world who make billions of dollars, and he is saying we cannot continue to ignore the needs of the poor, the needs of the sick, the dispossessed, the elderly people who are living alone, the young people who can't find jobs.** He is saying that the accumulation of money, that the worship of money, is not what life should be about. We cannot turn our backs on our fellow human beings.
**He is asking us to create a new society where the economy works for all, and not just the wealthy and the powerful.** He is asking us to be the kind of people whose happiness and well-being comes from serving others and being part of a human community, not spending our lives accumulating more and more wealth and power while oppressing others. He is saying that as a planet and as a people we have got to do better.
That's why I was so pleased that in his address to Congress today, Pope Francis spoke of Dorothy Day, who was a tireless advocate for the impoverished and working people in America. I think it was extraordinary that he cited her as one of the most important people in recent American history.
As the founder of the _Catholic Worker_ newspaper, Dorothy Day organized workers to stand up against the wealthy and powerful. Pope Francis said of her today in Congress:
> In these times when social concerns are so important, I cannot fail to mention the Servant of God Dorothy Day, who founded the Catholic Worker Movement. Her social activism, her passion for justice and for the cause of the oppressed, were inspired by the Gospel, her faith, and the example of the saints.
> How much progress has been made in this area in so many parts of the world! How much has been done in these first years of the third millennium to raise people out of extreme poverty! I know that you share my conviction that much more still needs to be done, and that in times of crisis and economic hardship a spirit of global solidarity must not be lost. At the same time I would encourage you to keep in mind all those people around us who are trapped in a cycle of poverty. They too need to be given hope. The fight against poverty and hunger must be fought constantly and on many fronts, especially in its causes. I know that many Americans today, as in the past, are working to deal with this problem.
The fact that the pope singled out Dorothy Day -- a fierce advocate in the fight for economic justice -- as one of the leaders he admires most is quite remarkable. We are living in a nation which worships the acquisition of money and great wealth, but turns its back on those in need. We are admiring people with billions of dollars, while we ignore people who sleep out on the streets. That must end.
Dorothy Day fought this fight, and as Pope Francis says, we must continue it. We need to move toward an economy which works for all, and not just the few.
We have so much poverty in a land of plenty. Together, we can work to make our country more fair for everybody.
I am glad that you are with me in this fight.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb228d/43f17890/595bd0dd/621c020e/3897767363/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em150924pope")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb228d/43f17890/595bd0dd/621c020f/3897767363/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb228d/43f17890/595bd0dd/621c020c/3897767363/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb228d/43f17890/595bd0dd/621c020d/3897767363/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb228d/43f17890/595bd0dd/621c020a/3897767363/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: "If politics must truly be at the service of the human person, it follows that it cannot be a slave to the economy and finance. Politics is, instead, an expression of our compelling need to live as one, in order to build as one the greatest common good: that of a community which sacrifices particular interests in order to share, in justice and peace, its goods, its interests, its social life. I do not underestimate the difficulty that this involves, but I encourage you in this effort." \- Pope Francis addressing Congress today Brothers and Sisters: I am not a theologian, an expert on the Bible, or a Catholic. I am just a U.S. senator from the small state of Vermont. But I am emailing you today to discuss Pope Francis in the hope that we can examine the very profound lessons that he is teaching people all over this world and some of the issues for which he is advocating. Now, there are issues on which the pope and I disagree -- like choice and marriage equality -- but from the moment he was elected, Pope Francis immediately let it be known that he would be a different kind of pope, a different kind of religious leader. He forces us to address some of the major issues facing humanity: war, income and wealth inequality, poverty, unemployment, greed, the death penalty and other issues that too many prefer to ignore. He is reaching out not just to the Catholic Church. He's reaching out to people all over the world with an incredibly strong message of social justice talking about the grotesque levels of wealth and income inequality. Pope Francis is looking in the eyes of the wealthiest people around the world who make billions of dollars, and he is saying we cannot continue to ignore the needs of the poor, the needs of the sick, the dispossessed, the elderly people who are living alone, the young people who can't find jobs. He is saying that the accumulation of money, that the worship of money, is not what life should be about. We cannot turn our backs on our fellow human beings. He is asking us to create a new society where the economy works for all, and not just the wealthy and the powerful. He is asking us to be the kind of people whose happiness and well-being comes from serving others and being part of a human community, not spending our lives accumulating more and more wealth and power while oppressing others. He is saying that as a planet and as a people we have got to do better. That's why I was so pleased that in his address to Congress today, Pope Francis spoke of Dorothy Day, who was a tireless advocate for the impoverished and working people in America. I think it was extraordinary that he cited her as one of the most important people in recent American history. As the founder of the Catholic Worker newspaper, Dorothy Day organized workers to stand up against the wealthy and powerful. Pope Francis said of her today in Congress: In these times when social concerns are so important, I cannot fail to mention the Servant of God Dorothy Day, who founded the Catholic Worker Movement. Her social activism, her passion for justice and for the cause of the oppressed, were inspired by the Gospel, her faith, and the example of the saints. How much progress has been made in this area in so many parts of the world! How much has been done in these first years of the third millennium to raise people out of extreme poverty! I know that you share my conviction that much more still needs to be done, and that in times of crisis and economic hardship a spirit of global solidarity must not be lost. At the same time I would encourage you to keep in mind all those people around us who are trapped in a cycle of poverty. They too need to be given hope. The fight against poverty and hunger must be fought constantly and on many fronts, especially in its causes. I know that many Americans today, as in the past, are working to deal with this problem. The fact that the pope singled out Dorothy Day -- a fierce advocate in the fight for economic justice -- as one of the leaders he admires most is quite remarkable. We are living in a nation which worships the acquisition of money and great wealth, but turns its back on those in need. We are admiring people with billions of dollars, while we ignore people who sleep out on the streets. That must end. Dorothy Day fought this fight, and as Pope Francis says, we must continue it. We need to move toward an economy which works for all, and not just the few. We have so much poverty in a land of plenty. Together, we can work to make our country more fair for everybody. I am glad that you are with me in this fight. In solidarity, Bernie Sanders "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
